title: Enterprise LLM Inference Engineering
text:
1 Welcome
This is an open knowledge base and textbook series for enterprise LLM inference engineering.
It covers:

LLM inference fundamentals
GPU systems
Inference engines
Distributed inference
Kubernetes AI platforms
llm-d
AI gateways
Observability
Enterprise architecture

title: Volume 1 — Foundations of LLM Inference
text:
This volume explains how LLM inference works from first principles.



The Inference Revolution
Anatomy of an Inference Request
Tokens and Tokenization
Transformer Inference
Prefill and Decode
The KV Cache
Inference Performance Metrics
GPU Foundations
